prompt: A World Cup football team badge/emblem for Panama in EXACTLY the same polished ornate style as the reference images: a soccer ball seamlessly integrated with a heraldic shield. The shield face shows Panama flag design: divided into 4 quarters, top-left white with a blue 5-pointed star, top-right red, bottom-left blue, bottom-right white with a red 5-pointed star — exactly Panama's national flag quartered layout. Bold clean outlines, vibrant flat colors, subtle gold metallic frame rim, polished glossy crest style matching the reference badge aesthetic. Centered composition, ~80% of frame, ONE single badge only, NO text, NO letters, NO grid, white background.
